prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约28950→30881→43676→32295→30254，近5年波动较大；2023年出现异常高位（43676），2024年大幅回落至32295，2025年继续回升至30254，近两年呈收窄趋稳态势，2025年基准约30254名；该校在陕西理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2025年分别为43、43、42、42、43人，基本稳定在42–43人；2026年计划缩减至40人，较2025年减少约7%，属于小幅缩招，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第120名，近年排名在116–122之间波动，整体层次稳定，属于中后段211院校；该校在抖音学校热度总排名中位列第95，评价为“一般”，综合热度约17.5万，短视频曝光量处于中低水平；声誉文件中无该校明显负面或正面舆情记录，报考关注度相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A类学科；招生专业中的食品科学与工程类对应此优势学科，对相关方向考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气类、电子信息类等专业社会热度持续偏高，该校在陕西招收计算机类、电气类等热门专业，可能吸引部分高分考生；但农林类特色专业（植物生产、动物生产等）社会热度一般。陕西省2026年物理类考生约20.65万人，较2025年（约17.25万人）增加约19.7%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距陕西较远，属于跨省报考；该校在陕西招生计划占比较小（约40–43人），本地考生跨省报考东北院校的意愿受地域偏好影响一般。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年趋稳于3万左右、2026年计划小幅缩招（-7%）、陕西省物理类考生大幅增加（+19.7%）、学校声誉平稳、热门专业有一定吸引力等因素：缩招使，但考生规模显著扩大是主要向上压力，两者对冲后预计位次较2025年基准略有上移；预测最低位次约29188名，区间28688–29688名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 28950 → 30881 → 43676 → 32295 → 30254, showing significant fluctuations in the past five years; an abnormal high occurred in 2023 (43676), followed by a sharp drop to 32295 in 2024, and a continued recovery to 30254 in 2025, with a narrowing and stabilizing trend in the last two years, with a baseline of approximately 30254 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi from 2021 to 2025 was 43, 43, 42, 42, and 43 students respectively, remaining stable at 42–43; in 2026, the plan is reduced to 40 students, a decrease of about 7% compared to 2025, which is a slight reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 120th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 116 and 122, maintaining a stable overall level, belonging to the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities; the university ranks 95th in overall popularity on Douyin, with a rating of 'average', a comprehensive popularity of about 175,000, and short video exposure at a medium-low level; there are no significant negative or positive public opinion records in the reputation file, and the attention for application is relatively stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A-, the only A-class discipline at the university; the Food Science and Engineering category in the enrollment majors corresponds to this advantageous discipline, attracting some high-scoring candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity; the university recruits popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering in Shaanxi, which may attract some high-scoring candidates; however, agriculture and forestry specialty majors (such as Plant Production, Animal Production) have average social popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 2025 (approximately 172,500), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Shaanxi, making it a cross-provincial application; the university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi accounts for a small proportion (about 40–43 students), and local candidates' willingness to apply to northeastern universities across provinces is generally influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings around 30,000 in recent years, a slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-7%), a significant increase in Shaanxi physics category candidates (+19.7%), stable university reputation, and some appeal of popular majors: the reduction in enrollment slightly eases competition, but the significant increase in candidate pool is the main upward pressure; after offsetting, the ranking is expected to rise slightly compared to the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 29188, with a range of 28688–29688.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Biological Sciences (National Science Base Top Talent Training Class).

Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Food Science and Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Water Resources Engineering (Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering, Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering, Agricultural Water Resources Engineering)
- Plant Production (Agronomy, Seed Science and Engineering)
- Animal Production (Animal Science, Grassland Science, Aquaculture)
- Food Science and Engineering (same as Tier 2 but with lower historical rankings).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 28688–29688, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Food Science and Engineering has an A- discipline advantage, Mechanical Engineering has broad employment prospects), Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) can be used as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Water Resources Engineering, Plant Production, Animal Production) as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<28688), focus on sprinting for Computer Science and Electrical Engineering and Automation.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 5061 → 4895 → 13500 → 6171 → 5076, showing significant fluctuations in the past five years; an abnormal high ranking (13500) occurred in 2023, which dropped sharply to 6171 in 2024, and further narrowed to 5076 in 2025, basically returning to the 2021–2022 level, with a baseline of about 5076 in 2025; the enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shaanxi from 2021 to 2025 was 7, 7, 8, 8, 7 respectively, remaining stable at 7–8; the 2026 plan increases to 10, an increase of about 42.9% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion, theoretically easing competition and increasing the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 120th, with recent rankings stable between 116–122, belonging to the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities; in the Douyin school popularity overall ranking, it is 95th, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 175,000; there are no obvious negative or positive public opinion records in the reputation file, and application attention is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A-, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Finance, Business Administration, Chinese International Education) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines, and liberal arts candidates have weak perception of the advantageous disciplines of agricultural and forestry universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the liberal arts enrollment majors, Finance is socially polarized and watched, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, and Chinese International Education has average popularity, with overall liberal arts major attractiveness being moderate. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in Shaanxi is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% compared to 2025 (about 75,600), expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Shaanxi, making it a cross-province application; the university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Shaanxi is small (7–10 people), and local candidates' willingness to apply to northeastern universities across provinces is generally affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the historical ranking has returned to around 5000 in 2025, the 2026 plan significantly expands (+42.9%), the number of history category candidates in Shaanxi increases (+17%), and liberal arts major popularity is average: the expansion eases competition, and although the increase in candidates puts upward pressure, it is largely offset by the expansion, so the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward compared to the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6431, with a range of 5931–6931.
